content: By The Robot Report Staff   March 2, 2026NORD adds 112 frame size to IE5  synchronous motor lineNORD offers IE5  motors in sizes 71, 90, and newly released, size 112, extending the power range from 0.5 to 15.0 hp.

metadata.description: The Robot Report provides robotics news, research, analysis and investment tracking for engineers, technology, and business professionals.
